title: agathophytum glaucum
intro: Agathophytum glaucum, also known as Arctic Rue, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Boraginaceae family, native to mountainous regions of Eastern Europe and Central Asia. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its essential oils, which have been used to treat various health conditions, including pain, inflammation, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Agathophytum glaucum include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and alleviate symptoms of allergies and colds. Agathophytum glaucum can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, making it a popular natural remedy among herbalists and health enthusiasts.
